file.content:
# Next Priority Task

## Current Task: Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement advanced filtering capabilities for racquet exploration with multi-dimensional range controls, brand filtering, and dynamic search
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx (new)
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx (new) 
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Advanced Filtering System with:
- Multi-dimensional range sliders (weight, head size, power, control, etc.)
- Brand multi-select with search
- Dynamic search with autocomplete
- Filter persistence and URL state management
- Real-time results updating

## Definition of Done
- [x] Range sliders for numeric properties (weight, head size, ratings)
- [x] Multi-select brand filter with search functionality
- [x] Dynamic text search with autocomplete suggestions
- [x] Filter state management with custom hook
- [x] Integration with both 2D and 3D visualizations
- [x] URL state persistence for filters
- [x] Clear/reset filters functionality

## ✅ COMPLETED
**Status:** All filtering functionality implemented and integrated
**Files created:** 
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx  
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx
- src/components/filters/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts
**Integration:** Filters fully integrated with main page and visualizations

## ✅ COMPLETED: Racquet Comparison Feature with side-by-side analysis
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement side-by-side racquet comparison functionality with radar charts, detailed specifications, and performance analysis
**Files created:** 
- src/components/comparison/RacquetComparison.tsx
- src/components/comparison/RadarChart.tsx
- src/components/comparison/ComparisonTable.tsx
- src/components/comparison/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetComparison.ts

**Integration:** All comparison functionality integrated with main page and visualizations

## Current Task: Racquet Recommendation Engine with AI-powered suggestions
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement intelligent racquet recommendation system that analyzes user preferences and suggests similar racquets based on playing style and performance characteristics
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/recommendations/RecommendationEngine.tsx (new)
- src/components/recommendations/RecommendationCard.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRecommendations.ts (new)
- src/lib/utils/recommendation-algorithm.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Racquet Recommendation Engine with:
- User preference collection (playing style, priorities)
- Similarity algorithm based on performance characteristics
- Intelligent recommendations with explanations
- Alternative suggestions for different budgets/preferences
- Integration with filtering and comparison systems

## Definition of Done
- [ ] User preference collection interface
- [ ] Similarity algorithm for racquet matching
- [ ] Recommendation display with explanations
- [ ] Alternative suggestions system
- [ ] Integration with filters and comparison
- [ ] Recommendation state management with custom hook

## After Completion
Next task will be: "Performance analytics dashboard with insights"

## Previous Task: ✅ Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Status:** Completed
**Files created:** 
- src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx
- src/lib/utils/pca-calculator.ts
**All requirements completed:** Basic 3D scene, camera controls, PCA calculations, interactive point selection

setFilters({ brands })} weightRange={filters.weight_range} weightLimits={ranges.weight} onWeightChange={(weight_range) => setFilters({ weight_range })} headSizeRange={filters.head_size_range} headSizeLimits={ranges.head_size} onHeadSizeChange={(head_size_range) => setFilters({ head_size_range })} powerRange={filters.power_range} powerLimits={ranges.power} onPowerChange={(power_range) => setFilters({ power_range })} controlRange={filters.control_range} controlLimits={ranges.control} onControlChange={(control_range) => setFilters({ control_range })} comfortRange={filters.comfort_range} comfortLimits={ranges.comfort} onComfortChange={(comfort_range) => setFilters({ comfort_range })} searchQuery={filters.search_query} onSearchChange={(search_query) => setFilters({ search_query })} onReset={resetFilters} totalCount={filterCounts.total} filteredCount={filterCounts.filtered} />
{/* Visualization */}
) : ( /* Recommendations Section */ { // Switch to visualization view and highlight the racquet setCurrentView('visualization'); // Could add logic to highlight specific racquet in visualization }} /> )}

## Current Task: Racquet Recommendation Engine with AI-powered suggestions
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement intelligent racquet recommendation system that analyzes user preferences and suggests similar racquets based on playing style and performance characteristics
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/recommendations/RecommendationEngine.tsx (new)
- src/components/recommendations/RecommendationCard.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRecommendations.ts (new)
- src/lib/utils/recommendation-algorithm.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Racquet Recommendation Engine with:
- User preference collection (playing style, priorities)
- Similarity algorithm based on performance characteristics
- Intelligent recommendations with explanations
- Alternative suggestions for different budgets/preferences
- Integration with filtering and comparison systems

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Similarity algorithm for racquet matching
- [ ] Recommendation display with explanations
- [ ] Alternative suggestions system
- [ ] Integration with filters and comparison
- [ ] Recommendation state management with custom hook

## After Completion
Next task will be: "Performance analytics dashboard with insights"

content.text:
Perfect! I have successfully completed the **Racquet Recommendation Engine with AI-powered suggestions** task. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## ✅ Task Completed: Racquet Recommendation Engine

**Files Created:**
- `src/lib/utils/recommendation-algorithm.ts` - Core algorithm for racquet similarity matching and recommendations
- `src/lib/hooks/useRecommendations.ts` - State management hook for recommendation functionality  
- `src/components/recommendations/RecommendationCard.tsx` - Individual recommendation display component
- `src/components/recommendations/RecommendationEngine.tsx` - Main recommendation interface with user preferences
- `src/components/recommendations/index.ts` - Component exports

**Key Features Implemented:**
- ✅ User preference collection interface (playing style, performance priorities, physical preferences)
- ✅ Sophisticated similarity algorithm based on performance characteristics and physical specs
- ✅ Recommendation display with detailed explanations and match scores
- ✅ Alternative suggestions system with different categories (primary, alternatives, budget)
- ✅ Full integration with existing filters and comparison systems
- ✅ Comprehensive state management with custom hook
- ✅ Tab-based navigation in main application interface

**Integration Points:**
- Added recommendation tab to main page navigation
- Connected with existing comparison system for racquet selection
- Integrated with filtered racquet data from existing filter system
- Seamless switching between visualization and recommendation views

The recommendation system analyzes user preferences across multiple dimensions including playing style, performance priorities, and physical specifications to provide intelligent, personalized racquet suggestions with detailed explanations and scoring.

**Next Task:** Performance analytics dashboard with insights
